headline: Lockheed’s New NGI Digital Missile Factories Could Be A Game Changer For Lockheed Martin (LMT)
summary: Lockheed Martin recently opened its 88,000-square-foot Missile Assembly Building 5 in Courtland, Alabama, to build the Next Generation Interceptor using advanced digital manufacturing, and also broke ground on an 87,000-square-foot Munitions Production Center in Troy to expand THAAD and future NGI production capacity. By pairing “digital twin” engineering with automated, modular missile assembly in Alabama, the company is tying long-term homeland defense programs directly to purpose-built,...
